text: 2252 - وَ رُوِيَ : «أَنَّ اَلْحَاجَّ وَ اَلْمُعْتَمِرَ يَرْجِعَانِ كَمَوْلُودَيْنِ مَاتَ أَحَدُهُمَا طِفْلاً لاَ ذَنْبَ لَهُ وَ عَاشَ اَلْآخَرُ مَا عَاشَ مَعْصُوماً ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.2252 - It has been narrated: "The pilgrim and the one performing Umrah return like two newborns—one who died as an infant without sin, and the other who lived their life free from sin."
